_comment: Measured 2026-05-26 on HeuristicReader + DeterministicEmbedder(128) + HnswIndex; ingest via real claude binary on 100 docs.

regression_thresholds._comment: Floor of v3 baseline. PRs below these = something broke.

key_findings: At 100-doc scale, overall Recall@3 drops to 0.30 (vs 0.55 at 30-doc). Softmax dilution: more entities competing for prior mass.
Tier-5 multi-hop is total failure (Recall@3 = 0.00). HeuristicReader has no cross-doc reasoning — it scores per-entity, pools per-doc, no joint reasoning.
Tier-2 multi-token regresses harder than tier-1 exact: 0.20 vs 0.40. Multi-word entity names get fractured by tokenization without trained embedder.
Tier-1 exact match also drops below 50% at this scale (0.40). DeterministicEmbedder collisions + softmax temperature flatten the prior.

what_would_fix_each_finding.tier_5_multi_hop: M3-full GFM training (graph-walk message passing learns to combine evidence from multiple docs).
what_would_fix_each_finding.softmax_dilution: BGE/E5 real embedder + tuned T₀; or learnable AddressingWeights.
what_would_fix_each_finding.multi_token_regression: Real semantic embedder (BGE-M3); HashEmbedder treats tokens independently.
what_would_fix_each_finding.general_floor: All of the above — v0.1.0 is a pipeline baseline, not a quality baseline.
